narrative:
Rocky River-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
